# Agent Reach

Agent Reach is a Windows-first integration layer for research tooling on Codex-style agents.

## Quick start

- Install guide: https://github.com/Panniantong/Agent-Reach/blob/main/docs/install.md
- Python SDK: https://github.com/Panniantong/Agent-Reach/blob/main/docs/python-sdk.md
- Repository README: https://github.com/Panniantong/Agent-Reach/blob/main/README.md
- Skill guide: https://github.com/Panniantong/Agent-Reach/blob/main/agent_reach/skill/SKILL.md

## Stable external surfaces

- `agent-reach channels --json`
- `agent-reach doctor --json`
- `agent-reach doctor --json --probe`
- `agent-reach collect --channel <name> --operation <op> --input <value> --json`
- `agent-reach install --dry-run --json`
- `agent-reach export-integration --client codex --format json`
- `agent-reach check-update --json`
- Python: `from agent_reach import AgentReachClient`

## Current scope

- Supported channels: `web`, `exa_search`, `github`, `hatena_bookmark`, `bluesky`, `qiita`, `youtube`, `rss`, optional `twitter`
- Purpose: bootstrapper, channel registry, readiness diagnostics, thin read-only collection helper
- Non-goal in this phase: full workflow orchestration such as scheduling, ranking, summarization, or publishing
